approvalSource: Steve gave GREEN LIGHT for the DAILY-EXEC-SUMMARY-001 plan with source-backed daily summary constraints and explicit UI/API/privacy gates.
notes: Approval covers only the daily executive summary route /foundation#daily-summary, the additive /api/foundation/daily-summary endpoint, date-scoped evidence-backed summaries, verifier/process coverage, and manual UI proof. It does not approve source lifecycle expansion, Strategy, Scoper, Agent Factory, corpus work, research cleanup, Action Review applying, or a new feature lane.
